task: Repeat each element of a 1D array 3 times (element-wise repeat)
error_location: line 1: axis=0 on 1D is fine but verifies understanding
clarification_query: For a 1D array, does np.repeat(arr, 3) repeat each element 3 times?
clarification_options: no, it repeats the whole array 3 times
explanation: np.repeat(arr, 3) with a 1D array repeats each element 3 times in place. No axis specification needed for 1D.
